meta.description_1l: Windows-first NDAX CLI tool for plots, comparison tables, and health checks.
meta.description_short: Single-container Python CLI tool that reads NDAX files, preprocesses battery test data, generates JPG plots, exports CSV comparison tables, and runs optional health checks. Windows .cmd launchers proxy into Python entrypoints in scripts/, while shared runtime logic and configuration live in table_data_extraction/ and project_config.yaml.

system.name: NDAX Processing Scripts
system.description: Processes local NDAX battery-test files into plots and comparison tables and can validate expected columns for troubleshooting.

users.name: Battery Analyst
users.description: Runs plotting and comparison-table workflows against local NDAX files.

users.name: Project Maintainer
users.description: Maintains launcher scripts, configuration, and troubleshooting workflows.

system.top_boundary: Local Windows-first CLI utility with batch launchers and Python scripts; it reads files from disk and writes JPG or CSV artifacts without a server or database.

containers.name: NDAX CLI Runtime
containers.description: Runs local NDAX processing workflows through Windows launchers and Python entrypoints.
responsibilities: Read NDAX files into pandas DataFrames
Write JPG and CSV artifacts to disk
Run optional health checks for debugging

components.name: Windows Launchers
components.description: Bootstraps the project venv and proxies user commands into the Python entrypoints.
responsibilities: Create and update the local venv

components.name: Plot CLI
components.description: Parses plot CLI arguments, loads NDAX files, prepares plot-ready data, and writes the final JPG path.
responsibilities: Coordinate plot preparation and image export

data_flows.payload: files + axis arguments + optional limits + output path

components.name: Comparison Table CLI
components.description: Parses table CLI arguments, computes extrema and short-circuit data, and exports the CSV table.
responsibilities: Coordinate preprocessing, extrema search, and CSV export

data_flows.payload: files + y-column + anchor-x + optional labels and output path

components.name: Health Check CLI
components.description: Runs a focused NDAX validation against required plot and CSV columns for troubleshooting.
responsibilities: Load default required columns from config

components.name: Configuration Contract
components.description: Loads, validates, caches, and exposes repository configuration and plotting defaults.
responsibilities: Expose plot palette and output directory settings

data_flows.payload: paths, plot defaults, csv defaults, extrema detection settings

components.name: NDAX Reader
components.description: Loads NDAX files through NewareNDA and resolves column names used by the CLI workflows.
responsibilities: Convert reader output into pandas DataFrames
Resolve user-supplied column names against actual headers

components.name: Preprocess And Time Helpers
components.description: Normalizes time axes, trims leading rows, and decides whether timestamps are usable.

components.name: Plotting Engine
components.description: Transforms NDAX frames into plot-ready series, applies palette and limits, and writes JPG files.
responsibilities: Render and save multi-series matplotlib plots

data_flows.payload: resolved DataFrames, labels, axis limits, output path

components.name: Comparison Analysis
components.description: Finds extrema windows, computes short-circuit timing, and builds table row structures.
responsibilities: Compute six extrema positions around anchor points
Build comparison table rows and headers

data_flows.payload: trimmed x/y series plus anchor positions

components.name: Export And Output Paths
components.description: Builds default output filenames and writes CSV table artifacts.
responsibilities: Build output paths from config and inputs
Write CSV slices and comparison tables

data_flows.trigger: Plot CLI needs a default JPG path
Table CLI needs a default CSV path or table export

components.name: Health Diagnostics
components.description: Validates required columns and formats troubleshooting reports for a single NDAX file.

data_flows.payload: one NDAX file path + required columns

components.name: Project Surface
components.description: Holds package metadata, operator instructions, and a small sample-path helper used in tests.
responsibilities: Expose a sample NDAX path helper for tests

external.name: newarenda
external.purpose: Reads NDAX files into pandas-compatible structures.

external.name: pandas
external.purpose: Tabular processing for plotting, health checks, and CSV export.

external.name: numpy
external.purpose: Supports extrema and numeric signal processing.

data_structures.name: ProjectConfigSchema
data_structures.description: Required YAML schema for output paths, plot defaults, CSV defaults, and extrema-detection settings.

fields.paths.output_dir: string - default output directory relative to repo root
fields.plot.defaults.x_column: string - default X axis column name
fields.plot.defaults.y_column: string - default Y axis column name
fields.csv.defaults.columns: list[str] - required CSV export and health-check columns
fields.comparison_table.extrema_detection: mapping - window and threshold settings for extrema search

data_structures.name: PlotSeries
data_structures.description: Single labeled line definition passed into multi-series plot rendering.

fields.label: str - legend label for the plotted line

data_structures.name: HealthCheckResult
data_structures.description: Diagnostic result for one NDAX file checked against required columns.

fields.row_count: int - number of rows in the loaded DataFrame
fields.columns: list[str] - available columns in the file
fields.required_columns: list[str] - expected plot and CSV columns

data_structures.name: ExtremaIndices
data_structures.description: Mapping from public extrema labels to detected row indices or null when no extrema is found.

fields.+U_l: int | null - left positive extrema index
fields.+U_m: int | null - middle positive extrema index
fields.+U_r: int | null - right positive extrema index
fields.-U_l: int | null - left negative extrema index
fields.-U_m: int | null - middle negative extrema index
fields.-U_r: int | null - right negative extrema index

glossary.definition: Battery-test data file format read through the NewareNDA library.
User-provided X-axis reference point that anchors extrema search in the comparison table workflow.
Derived event time computed from threshold and amplitude-collapse heuristics in the comparison workflow.
Leading rows with Status=Rest that are trimmed before analysis.
